content: Dashboard status cards: consistent height, status indicator (colored dot/badge), skeleton shimmer while loading, empty states with illustration + CTA. Responsive grid via CSS Grid or Tailwind responsive utilities; cards stack on mobile. Container queries enable cards to adapt to own width (show/hide legend at 300px vs 600px). Skeleton screens preferred over spinners; use content-shaped placeholders with pulse animation. Empty states: short message + action button (e.g. 'No machines connected. Add your first machine.'). Radix UI / Shadcn primitives are idiomatic for this stack.
